## CreateAgentInput variable

Zod schema for creating a new agent. Accepts untrimmed strings and pipes them through validation.

**Signature:**

```typescript
CreateAgentInput: z.ZodObject<
	{
		agentCompanyId: z.ZodString
		suffix: z.ZodOptional<
			z.ZodEnum<['Jr', 'Sr', 'II', 'III', 'IV', 'V', 'MD', 'PhD', 'Esq']>
		>
	} & {
		firstName: z.ZodPipeline<z.ZodString, z.ZodBranded<z.ZodString, 'Name'>>
		lastName: z.ZodPipeline<z.ZodString, z.ZodBranded<z.ZodString, 'Name'>>
		preferredName: z.ZodOptional<
			z.ZodPipeline<z.ZodString, z.ZodBranded<z.ZodString, 'Name'>>
		>
		email: z.ZodPipeline<z.ZodString, z.ZodBranded<z.ZodString, 'Email'>>
		birthDate: z.ZodPipeline<z.ZodString, z.ZodBranded<z.ZodString, 'DateOnlyISO'>>
	},
	'strict',
	z.ZodTypeAny,
	{
		email: string & z.BRAND<'Email'>
		agentCompanyId: string
		firstName: string & z.BRAND<'Name'>
		lastName: string & z.BRAND<'Name'>
		birthDate: string & z.BRAND<'DateOnlyISO'>
		preferredName?: (string & z.BRAND<'Name'>) | undefined
		suffix?: 'Jr' | 'Sr' | 'II' | 'III' | 'IV' | 'V' | 'MD' | 'PhD' | 'Esq' | undefined
	},
	{
		email: string
		agentCompanyId: string
		firstName: string
		lastName: string
		birthDate: string
		preferredName?: string | undefined
		suffix?: 'Jr' | 'Sr' | 'II' | 'III' | 'IV' | 'V' | 'MD' | 'PhD' | 'Esq' | undefined
	}
>
```
